no: Importing mods Fake Import The cutscene bug and fix: http://www.shsforums.net/topic/56126-fake-import-mod/page-2#entry609041 TL DR: Open setup-fakeimport.tp2. Find each instance of this line: GiveItemCreate("chan07",Player1,0,0,0) then add this line immediately below (with no //): Continue()

in.t: Open setup-fakeimport.tp2 and add Continue() after each GiveItemCreate line to fix cutscene bug.

sum: Lets you create a fake import save to start BG2/EET with custom equipment and story flags, as if you'd played through BG1 with specific choices.

co.n: I didn't kill Drizzt, he's my hero
